text:
The Misette Limited Edition Bull Snake (, Mizetto-sha no Buru Suneiku Gentei Seisan-sū—lit. "Midget Company's Bull Snake [S55] Limited Production") is a collectible weapon. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 67 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

At the Sengi Guild, its agent manages to find three job offers that match Kurapika's request. One of the offers involves a handgun buff seeking to acquire the Misette Limited Edition Bull Snake: Model S55, No. 001.
